title: Nokotan's Antler Count
statement: Noko Shikanoko, known to her friends as Nokotan, is counting antler points across n deer in a forest. Given q questions of the form "how many total antler points do deer 1 through i have?", answer each one.
input_format: The first line contains a single integer t (1 ≤ t ≤ 10<sup>4</sup>), the number of test cases.
Each test case begins with two integers n and q. The next line contains n integers a<sub>1</sub>, a<sub>2</sub>, ..., a<sub>n</sub>. The next q lines each contain a single integer i.
output_format: For each query, print the sum of a<sub>1</sub> through a<sub>i</sub> on its own line.
constraints: Sum of n and sum of q across all test cases ≤ 2×10<sup>5</sup>
